implementation_notes: Implementation via task-work delegation. Files planned: 0, Files actual: 0
requirements_addressed: AC-001 escalate_to_frontier added to dispatch.py with @tool(parse_docstring=True) and the required signature (Turn 1)
AC-002 verbatim ATTENDED-ONLY warning is the first line of the docstring (Turn 1)
AC-003 GEMINI_3_1_PRO routes to gemini-3.1-pro via google-genai SDK; OPUS_4_7 routes to claude-opus-4-7 via anthropic SDK (Turn 1)
AC-004 out-of-enum target rejected before body runs (no provider contacted) (Turn 1)
AC-005 missing GOOGLE_API_KEY / ANTHROPIC_API_KEY return the documented ERROR: config_missing strings (Turn 1)
AC-006 unreachable provider returns DEGRADED: provider_unavailable — <reason> with no exception propagation (Turn 1)
AC-007 empty body returns DEGRADED: provider_unavailable — empty response (Turn 1)
AC-008 happy path returns provider response text as str (Turn 1)
AC-009 every successful or degraded call emits exactly one structured INFO log via log_frontier_escalation(ctx, logger) with model_alias='cloud-frontier' (Turn 1)
AC-010 instruction body never logged nor echoed in error / degraded strings (Turn 1)
AC-011 never raises — all error paths produce a structured string (Turn 1)
AC-012 ruff check + ruff format pass cleanly on both files (Turn 1; re-verified Turn 2 with new glue file)
BDD: missing pytest-bdd glue for FEAT-J003 added (Turn 2) — scenarios now collected, pending step-defs classified as scenarios_pending (tolerated)

completion_promises.criterion_text: src/jarvis/tools/dispatch.py — the FEAT-JARVIS-002 DDR-005/C2 reserved slot — gains escalate_to_frontier(instruction: str, target: FrontierTarget = FrontierTarget.GEMINI_3_1_PRO) -> str decorated with @tool(parse_docstring=True).
completion_promises.evidence: Added @tool(parse_docstring=True) escalate_to_frontier(instruction, target=FrontierTarget.GEMINI_3_1_PRO) -> str at the bottom of src/jarvis/tools/dispatch.py and exported via __all__. Verified by TestToolDecoration (3 tests: BaseTool instance, name, args schema includes instruction + target).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Docstring (the contract per DDR-005 precedent) states verbatim: 'ATTENDED-ONLY — cloud escape hatch. Never invoke from ambient, learning, or async-subagent contexts.'
completion_promises.evidence: First line of escalate_to_frontier.__doc__ is the verbatim string (backslash-newline continuation in the source preserves the single-line content). Verified by TestDocstringContract.test_docstring_contains_required_attended_only_text and test_description_carries_required_attended_only_text.

completion_promises.criterion_text: target=GEMINI_3_1_PRO invokes google_genai:gemini-3.1-pro via the google-genai SDK; target=OPUS_4_7 invokes anthropic:claude-opus-4-7 via the anthropic SDK.
completion_promises.evidence: _escalate_gemini calls google.genai.Client(api_key=...).models.generate_content(model='gemini-3.1-pro', contents=instruction); _escalate_opus calls anthropic.Anthropic(api_key=...).messages.create(model='claude-opus-4-7', ...). Verified by TestHappyPath.test_gemini_happy_path_calls_correct_model and test_opus_happy_path_calls_correct_model (assert kwargs['model'] equals the documented alias).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Out-of-enum target is rejected at @tool(parse_docstring=True) argument coercion before the function body runs (ASSUM-005, confirmed) — no provider contacted.
completion_promises.evidence: Pydantic schema synthesised from FrontierTarget type hint by langchain's @tool wrapper raises pydantic.ValidationError on a literal 'NOT_A_VALID_TARGET'. Verified by TestTargetCoercion.test_invalid_target_does_not_contact_any_provider — patches both google.genai.Client and anthropic.Anthropic and asserts neither was called.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Missing GOOGLE_API_KEY when called with Gemini target returns 'ERROR: config_missing — GOOGLE_API_KEY not set'; missing ANTHROPIC_API_KEY when called with Opus target returns 'ERROR: config_missing — ANTHROPIC_API_KEY not set'. No outbound request made in either case.
completion_promises.evidence: Both branches read os.environ at entry, return the exact documented ERROR strings on missing keys, and short-circuit before importing the SDK module. Verified by TestConfigMissingGemini (3 tests) and TestConfigMissingAnthropic (3 tests) — including assertions that the patched provider Client was never called.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Unreachable provider returns 'DEGRADED: provider_unavailable — <short reason>'; no exception propagates.
completion_promises.evidence: Both branches wrap the SDK call in try/except Exception (boundary guard per ADR-ARCH-021) and return f'DEGRADED: provider_unavailable — {type(exc).__name__}'. The exception class name is the <short reason> — chosen because it can never contain caller input. Verified by TestProviderUnavailable (3 tests covering Gemini ConnectionError, Opus ConnectionError, and a single-INFO-log assertion).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Empty body from provider maps to 'DEGRADED: provider_unavailable — empty response' (ASSUM-001, confirmed).
completion_promises.evidence: After successful SDK call, both branches normalise text via getattr(response, 'text', None) or '' (Gemini) and getattr(response.content[0], 'text', None) or '' guarded by len(content) (Opus). Empty/missing text routes to the documented DEGRADED string. Verified by TestDegradedEmpty (3 tests: Gemini empty text, Opus empty text, Opus empty content list).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Happy path returns the provider's response text as a str — not the raw SDK response object.
completion_promises.evidence: Both branches return the extracted .text attribute (a Python str) directly. Verified by TestHappyPath.test_gemini_happy_path_returns_response_text and test_opus_happy_path_returns_response_text (assert result == 'Hello from Gemini' / 'Hello from Opus' — string equality, not object equality).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Every successful OR degraded call emits exactly one structured INFO log via log_frontier_escalation(ctx, logger) with model_alias='cloud-frontier' (budget trace per ADR-ARCH-030). outcome field set to 'success', 'config_missing', 'provider_unavailable', or 'degraded_empty'.
completion_promises.evidence: Centralised _emit_frontier_log helper constructs FrontierEscalationContext and calls log_frontier_escalation(ctx, logger) at every terminal branch — by construction, each call to escalate_to_frontier emits exactly one INFO record. Verified by TestStructuredLog.test_success_emits_exactly_one_info_record (asserts len(records) == 1 with model_alias='cloud-frontier' and outcome='success'), plus the per-outcome assertions in TestConfigMissingGemini, TestConfigMissingAnthropic, TestProviderUnavailable, and TestDegradedEmpty.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Instruction body is never logged nor echoed in any error/degraded return string (ASSUM-006, confirmed; concern #6 in the review report).
completion_promises.evidence: FrontierEscalationContext records only instruction_length (per the existing TASK-J003-004 redaction posture); the DEGRADED reason uses type(exc).__name__ which cannot contain user input; and the config_missing / degraded_empty strings are constants. Verified by TestStructuredLog.test_log_does_not_carry_instruction_body (uses a unique secret token and asserts it never appears in any record's banned attributes or formatted message), plus the secret-string-not-in-result assertions in TestConfigMissingGemini, TestConfigMissingAnthropic, and TestProviderUnavailable.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Never raises — all error paths produce a structured string per ADR-ARCH-021.
completion_promises.evidence: Boundary-guard pattern: every SDK call sits inside try/except Exception with an early-return error string. The dispatch path itself has no other unguarded raise points. Verified by TestNeverRaises.test_runtime_error_inside_provider_call_is_caught and test_value_error_inside_opus_call_is_caught — both inject exceptions inside the SDK call and assert the function returns a DEGRADED string instead of propagating.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors.
completion_promises.evidence: ruff check on src/jarvis/tools/dispatch.py, tests/test_tools_escalate_to_frontier.py, and the new features/feat-jarvis-003-async-subagent-and-frontier-escape/test_feat_jarvis_003_async_subagent_and_frontier_escape.py glue reports 'All checks passed!'; ruff format --check on the same files reports them already formatted. Full pytest suite: 1236 passed, 2 skipped, 0 failed.
